title: rate_limit check before DB ops in SUBSCRIBE_REQUEST prevents diversifier exhaustion
description: ws.rs:1854 SUBSCRIBE_REQUEST calls check_rate_limit BEFORE validating duration_days and BEFORE allocating a diversifier index. This is correct ordering: a client sending duration_days=0 repeatedly would otherwise exhaust the diversifier counter with no invoice created. A contributor might 'simplify' by moving validation before rate-limit, but that would restore the exhaustion vector. The current order (rate-limit → validate → allocate) is the only safe order.
